features.featureTitle: Redesign the calendar view in DashboardPage with a visually attractive, elegant, and spiritual style consistent with the app's terracotta/cream theme. The calendar must feature: a refined month header with stylish prev/next navigation arrows, day-of-week labels styled in terracotta accent color, date cells with generous rounded corners and subtle hover/focus states, clear visual distinction for today's date (e.g., terracotta border or highlight ring), a bold filled terracotta background for the selected/active date cell with cream text, dots or subtle indicators on dates that have jap data recorded, smooth transitions on interaction, and consistent font sizing using the app's existing Cinzel/Lato font stack. The overall calendar container should use a card-style surface (elevated with a soft shadow) with a dark-brown or cream background depending on the current theme mode. All existing functionality (date selection, jap count display, timezone-safe date keys) must be fully preserved.
